text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I ran as fast as I could, but the result was wholly
non-buono...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I didn't make anyone smile. Not myself, not the
fans who came to watch me, not even you,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But listen... This is the last time I'm going to feel
this disappointed!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Next time, I'm definitely going to make everyone smile! It's time to stop feeling sorry for myself and get ready to try again!
choice_data_list: We've gotta train like we mean it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Next time, I'm definitely going to make everyone smile! It's time to stop feeling sorry for myself and get ready to try again!
choice_data_list: We've gotta train like we mean it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! The next race is mine!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to blow you away with how well I do, so
when that happens, let's both smile till our cheeks
hurt! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Right! I'm going to become even stronger and
more reliable than ever—just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer—Nope, that's not it—Boss! I'm counting on you to train me till I drop!
